commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fe1eb10c4e21e62909fe6a59f9956130ec730568)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `[tool:name]` plain-text tool-call parsing, promotes matching xAI stream text into structured tool calls, and strips or rejects leaked tool-call-only outbound text before chat delivery.

PR surface: Source +267, Tests +158. Total +425 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main does not parse `[tool:name] { ... }` and the xAI wrapper has no promotion step, so the PR's synthetic stream fixture is a clear reproduction path. A live xAI/Discord transcript is still missing.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor real behavior proof and a code update to avoid duplicating the LM Studio promotion path before a maintainer can consider merge.

target.title: Prevent plain text tool call leaks
target.body:
## Summary
- Promote standalone provider text like `[tool:read] { ... }` into structured tool calls before the xAI tool stream wrapper runs.
- Teach the shared tool payload parser and user-facing/outbound sanitizers about `[tool:name]` pseudo-tool syntax.
- Strip/reject leaked tool-call-only message sends so Discord cannot echo raw internal tool syntax back into chat.

## Testing
- `/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin/node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/tool-payload.test.ts extensions/xai/stream.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-helpers.sanitizeuserfacingtext.test.ts src/infra/outbound/sanitize-text.test.ts src/infra/outbound/message-action-runner.send-validation.test.ts`
- `env PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo`
- `env PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions.tsbuildinfo`
- `env PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.src.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/test-src.tsbuildinfo`
- `env PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `env PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/sync-plugin-sdk-exports.mjs --check`
- `env PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/check-plugin-sdk-subpath-exports.mjs`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
- Built the rebased branch into `openclaw:spartacus-latest-main-hotfix` with `docker build -t openclaw:spartacus-latest-main-hotfix .`.
- Recreated the live Spartacus gateway with `docker compose up -d --no-build --force-recreate openclaw-gateway`.
- Verified `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:18889/healthz` returned `{"ok":true,"status":"live"}`.
- Verified container logs showed `agent model: xai/grok-4.3`, Discord guild `1488730235544273049` resolved, and `Discord bot probe resolved @Spartacus`.
- Verified the rebuilt container reports OpenClaw `2026.5.24` with build timestamp `2026-05-24T22:54:41.818Z`.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
